svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="闭环E2E总览" id="e2e-overview"> <mxGraphModel dx="-564" dy="-135" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="多真实角色互操作 → 断言落在数据库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="440" x="330" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="用户2 (CC) · 动作发起方
token: t2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="80" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="acts" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="点赞 / 评论 / 关注 / @提及
（覆盖所有通知类型）
连续 3 次点赞测聚合" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="76" width="240" x="360" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="notifications/send API
（业务接口，非 UI）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="680" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;" value="用户1 (小福天) · 感知方
token: t1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="80" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="查通知列表 (in-app API)
断言落在数据层：" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="240" x="360" y="225" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="asserts" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="① 列表非空（通知真入库）
② 含互动通知（点赞/评论/关注通）
③ 含@提醒（POST_MENTION 通）
④ 聚合数正确（不串通知）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96" width="290" x="680" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea1" edge="1" parent="1" source="u2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="acts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea2" edge="1" parent="1" source="acts" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="api"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea3" edge="1" parent="1" source="api" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="asserts" value="入库"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea4" edge="1" parent="1" source="u1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="query"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ea5" edge="1" parent="1" source="query" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;" target="asserts" value="数据层断言"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="blind" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="单用户 UI 测试的盲区（这套专治）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="320" x="360" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="角色流转出错：A 操作了 B 没感知" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="300" x="80" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="静默后端失败：UI 绿了但数据没落库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="300" x="400" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=8;" value="聚合/串通知：3 条点赞没聚成 1 条" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="280" x="720" y="395" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
